title: Smoky Roasted Tahini Japanese Paella
description: A unique take on the classic Spanish dish featuring umami-rich ingredients and a buddhist-temple-friendly twist.

ingredients.name: tenderstem bok choy, stems only, halved lengthwise

instructions: Mix tahini with canola oil until smooth. Add salt and smoked paprika; whisk in chives.
Toast sesame seeds in a dry pan over medium heat for 1-2 minutes, shaking frequently.
Arrange tenderstem bok choy stems on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with tahini mixture, toss to coat evenly. Roast at 375°F for 10 minutes.
Place roasted bok choy onto the prepared paella pan. Sprinkle toasted sesame seeds over the top.
Top with remaining tahini mixture and bake an additional 5-8 minutes until heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
